name: SlashSlack
description: An easy-to-run Slack clone that lives on your own server. Channels, DMs, file uploads and invites — your team chat, self-hosted.
compose:
name: "slashnode-slashslack"
services:
  slashslack:
    image: "ghcr.io/slashbinslashnoname/slashslack:latest"
    container_name: "slashslack"
    restart: "unless-stopped"
    networks:
      - slashnode
    entrypoint:
      - "/bin/sh"
      - "-c"
      - 's=/app/data/.session_secret; [ -s "$$s" ] || { mkdir -p /app/data; head -c 64 /dev/urandom | base64 | tr -dc A-Za-z0-9 | head -c 48 > "$$s"; }; export SESSION_SECRET="$$(cat "$$s")"; exec node server/dist/index.js'
    ports:
      - "3000:3000"
    environment:
      PORT: "3000"
      NODE_ENV: "production"
      DATA_DIR: "/app/data"
      UPLOAD_DIR: "/app/uploads"
      PUBLIC_ORIGIN: "${self.exports.url}"
    volumes:
      - "slashslack-data:/app/data"
      - "slashslack-uploads:/app/uploads"
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  slashslack-data:
    name: "slashnode-slashslack_slashslack_slashslack-data"
  slashslack-uploads:
    name: "slashnode-slashslack_slashslack_slashslack-uploads"
